message:
feat: expose console version via /api/version and --version flag (#3236)

Use runtime/debug.ReadBuildInfo() to extract VCS metadata (git commit,
time, dirty state) from the Go binary at startup. Add /api/version
endpoint and enrich /health with git_commit, git_time, git_dirty, and
go_version fields. Add --version flag to console binary. Fix
.goreleaser.yaml and Dockerfile to inject release version via ldflags.

Closes #3223

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ builds:
       - arm64
     ldflags:
       - -s -w
+      - -X github.com/kubestellar/console/pkg/api.Version={{.Version}}
 
 archives:
   - id: kc-agent

@@ -10,8 +10,11 @@ RUN go mod download
 # Copy source
 COPY . .
 
+# Build args for version
+ARG APP_VERSION=dev
+
 # Build
-RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -o console ./cmd/console
+RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w -X github.com/kubestellar/console/pkg/api.Version=${APP_VERSION}" -o console ./cmd/console
 
 # Build stage - Frontend
 FROM node:20-alpine AS frontend-builder

@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ package main
 
 import (
 	"flag"
+	"fmt"
 	"log"
 	"os"
 	"os/signal"
@@ -21,8 +22,14 @@ func main() {
 	dbPath := flag.String("db", "", "Database path (default: ./data/console.db)")
 	watchdog := flag.Bool("watchdog", false, "Run as watchdog reverse proxy (serves fallback page when backend is down)")
 	backendPort := flag.Int("backend-port", watchdogDefaultBackendPort, "Backend port for watchdog to proxy to")
+	version := flag.Bool("version", false, "Print version and exit")
 	flag.Parse()
 
+	if *version {
+		fmt.Printf("console version %s\n", api.Version)
+		os.Exit(0)
+	}
+
 	// Watchdog mode: lightweight reverse proxy, no DB/k8s/MCP initialization
 	if *watchdog {
 		listenPort := watchdogDefaultListenPort
